title: Default-Style Fall Pack
description: An Autumn overhaul to the Default Experience!
body:
![Fall Pack Logo](https://i.imgur.com/QTQ7sGh.png)

---

This lightweight resource pack gives your world an autumn theme, while maintaining the default style. For a version of this pack with a Halloween spin, try my **[Halloween Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-style-halloween-pack)**!

**What's Inside**:
- Red, Orange, and Yellow Leaves
- Fallen leaves on grass
- Yellower grass
- Fall-themed GUI

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1)

![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png)
![Fall Leaves on a Path](https://i.imgur.com/VgMZtOx.png)
![Forest Cabin with fall foliage](https://i.imgur.com/e9WMWgJ.png)
![Mansion in a Dark Forest](https://i.imgur.com/UvpRopn.png)
![GUI](https://i.imgur.com/OARMU0K.png)

![Pairings Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/rGi1bap.png)
Some resource packs and client-side mods that pair nicely with this resource pack!
- [Mod][Fabric] 🍂[Falling Leaves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric): adds gorgeous falling leaves that fits nicely with the fall theme.
